import json, os, re, unicodedata, difflib, math, statistics

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
len(quran), type(quran)[:0]
quran[0], quran[100]

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)
len(hadiths), type(hadiths[0]), hadiths[0].keys()

def normalize_arabic(s):
    # remove tashkeel (diacritics)
    s = re.sub(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0657-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', s)
    # tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ', '')
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ى','ي')
    # remove punctuation symbols
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    # lowercase (not applicable)
    s = s.lower()
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def search_quran(term, topn=20):
    norm_term = normalize_arabic(term)
    scores = []
    for rec in quran:
        text = rec['ayah_text']
        norm_text = normalize_arabic(text)
        # compute ratios
        # Use difflib SequenceMatcher
        ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, norm_term, norm_text).ratio()
        # substring check
        contains = 1 if norm_term in norm_text else 0
        # token overlap
        t_tokens = set(norm_term.split())
        x_tokens = set(norm_text.split())
        inter = len(t_tokens & x_tokens)
        union = len(t_tokens | x_tokens) if (t_tokens | x_tokens) else 1
        jacc = inter / union
        scores.append((ratio*0.6 + jacc*0.4 + contains*0.1, ratio, jacc, contains, rec))
    # sort by combined score
    scores.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return scores[:topn]

term = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
search_quran(term, topn=10)[:3]

def search_hadith(term, topn=20):
    norm_term = normalize_arabic(term)
    scores = []
    for rec in hadiths:
        text = rec.get('hadithTxt') or ""  # some hadiths might use Matn
        matn = rec.get('Matn') or ""
        # combine if needed
        search_texts = [text, matn]
        best = (0,0,0,0,"")
        for tx in search_texts:
            if not tx:
                continue
            norm_text = normalize_arabic(tx)
            # compute ratio/jacc/contains
            ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, norm_term, norm_text).ratio()
            contains = 1 if norm_term in norm_text else 0
            t_tokens = set(norm_term.split())
            x_tokens = set(norm_text.split())
            inter = len(t_tokens & x_tokens)
            union = len(t_tokens | x_tokens) if (t_tokens | x_tokens) else 1
            jacc = inter / union
            combined = ratio*0.6 + jacc*0.4 + contains*0.1
            if combined > best[0]:
                best = (combined, ratio, jacc, contains, tx)
        scores.append((best[0], best[1], best[2], best[3], rec))
    scores.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return scores[:topn]

search_hadith("وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ", topn=5)
